reasoning: The PCI DSS control 7.2.5 focuses on ensuring that sensitive data is not publicly accessible. In a Kubernetes environment, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to restrict ingress and egress traffic, services are not exposed unnecessarily to the internet, and that ingress controllers are configured with TLS to secure data in transit. These checks help ensure that Kubernetes resources are not inadvertently exposed to the public internet.
title: Requirement 7.2.5
